wheel.name: Wellness Beyond LLJC Website
wheel.description: Static marketing/support website for the Wellness Beyond #LLJC youth-wellness nonprofit. Multi-page (home + crisis resources), light/dark themed, content derived verbatim from the org brochure. Served locally via a Bun static server behind Caddy at http://wbl.local/.

identity.name: Wellness Beyond LLJC Website
identity.one_liner: Static, brochure-faithful website for the Wellness Beyond #LLJC youth-wellness nonprofit (resilience, grief, anti-bullying, suicide prevention).
identity.success_looks_like: A clean, accessible multi-page site whose copy, logo, and palette match the org brochure exactly; light/dark themes; crisis (988) paths prominent; verified donation/social links before launch.

in_scope: Content verbatim from the org brochure
Light + dark theming from the supplied design system
Bun static dev server behind Caddy (wbl.local:3150)
out_of_scope: Inventing programs/content not on the brochure (e.g. a 'Wellness Bag' page) without operator confirmation
Shipping unverified payment/social links (QR-only on brochure)

_project_foundation.approach: Ground every asset in the real brochure/logo files; build plain semantic HTML + a token-based CSS design system; mark anything unverifiable as TODO rather than fabricate.
_project_foundation.philosophy: Faithful to the brand and to the truth — a crisis-support nonprofit site must be accurate and accessible, never padded with AI-invented copy.

evolution_log.note: Greenfield v4 onboard (empty dir, no source yet); provisional foundation pending operator confirmation of purpose/stack.

Session 1: identity confirmed. Built the site from the brochure (index.html + resources.html), token-based light/dark CSS, theme toggle, real logo (dark + keyed-transparent light variant), and a Bun dev server (wbl.local:3150 via Caddy) with a pre-flight stale-listener kill check. Status greenfield-stub -> active.

_session_state.next_session_recommendation: Image fix shipped (jenzele.jpg/.webp committed + pushed). Verify on next Vercel deploy that wellnessbeyondlljc.org renders the Jenzele photo in the <picture> element. Earlier open item still stands: confirm the live .org domain serves the full built site (was returning ~15 bytes).
